Actor , ViewScreenInterface public class IconViewScreen3D extends ViewScreen A sink actor that renders a two-dimensional scene into an Icon. NOTE: This doesn't seem to be possible (using the techniques I tried) in the current version of Java3D

iques I tried) in the current version of Java3D without having the frame visible. Alternatively, we would work on embedding a Canvas3D inside Diva, but then we run into standard nastiness getting AWT objects to work inside Swing objects.
